arts.sum: LaLiga returns after the international break and Joe Champion has predictions for all 10 matches from Spain's top flight this weekend.

Atlético de Madrid, currently third in the league with 26 points from 13 matches, boasts a record of seven wins, five draws, and one loss, and have the tightest defence in La Liga with only seven goal...

arts.ttl: Preview: Atletico Madrid vs. Alaves - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Atletico Madrid and Alaves, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
